name: Wisteria Twist
description:
[GitHub Repo](https://github.com/WilliamTurf/tool1-civ442-Turf)
 This tool estimates carbon monoxide (CO) accumulation from candles in an indoor space using a well-mixed air (CSTR) model with ventilation. Users can change number of wicks, room size, and ventilation to estimate exposure levels per time. The model outputs CO in mg/m³ and ppm and compares it with EPA, OSHA, and WHO limits to help evaluate safety.
